channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: President Donald Trump defends business dealings, his children in exclusive interview with CNBC
item.description: Trump spoke with CNBC as he prepares to celebrate the 250th birthday of the U.S. on July 4 with an event and fireworks on the National Mall in Washington.

item.title: Job seekers giving up: Labor force participation rate falls to lowest in 50 years, outside of Covid era
item.description: A drop in the unemployment rate helped provide some upside to what was an otherwise downbeat jobs report — but it was for all the wrong reasons.

item.title: Dow jumps nearly 600 points to record close; Nasdaq slides as chip stocks suffer: Live updates
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average scaled to record highs on Thursday as investors reacted to a weaker-than-expected nonfarm payrolls report for June.

item.title: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
item.description: The day before President Donald Trump walked back his tariff policy turned out to be one of his busiest days of 2025 for stock buying.

item.title: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%
item.description: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to rise by 115,000 in June and the unemployment rate to hold steady at 4.3%.

item.title: Saudi Arabia has ramped up oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz since U.S.-Iran deal
item.description: Saudi Arabia is restarting its export logistics in the Persian Gulf after a three-month pause, according to Kpler.

item.title: Tesla stock sinks 7% despite strong deliveries report, posting worst day in nearly a year
item.description: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.

item.title: Led by Buc-ee’s and new rival Dolly Parton, America’s gas station chains are in a mega-sizing era
item.description: Gas station chains led by Buc-ee's are coming closer to rivaling America's big box stores in size, and Dolly Parton is getting in on the retail trend.

item.title: Microsoft commits $2.5 billion and 6,000 employees to new AI implementation unit
item.description: Microsoft is the latest tech company to form a business focused on helping customers understand and implement artificial intelligence.

item.title: Dow rides into new week at record high. What investors are watching ahead
item.description: Investors are wondering what the second half of the year will bring after big gains for stocks.

item.title: High-end camping and a capital raise: AutoCamp is banking on summer travel to fuel growth
item.description: AutoCamp offers Airstream suites, polished cabins, fire pits, design-forward amenities and access to iconic outdoor destinations.

item.title: Americans are paying record prices for steak. Here's why demand isn't cracking
item.description: Despite record beef prices, Americans aren't giving up steak. Consumers are treating beef as an affordable luxury and prioritizing it for special occasions.

item.title: Healthcare surged in June. Raymond James is adding these two dividend payers to list of top picks
item.description: The healthcare sector had a hot June, and Raymond James likes these two dividend-paying stocks.

item.title: Olympian David Hearn indicted in Reflecting Pool destruction of property case
item.description: President Donald Trump has made the renovation of the Reflecting Pool on the National Mall a top priority in his second year back in the White House.

item.title: Trump Accounts get a boost from employer contributions — Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are the latest to offer matching programs
item.description: The growing list of companies that will match contributions to Trump Accounts for their employees now includes Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley.

item.title: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike's files for IPO, reports 50% same-store sales growth in recent years
item.description: Jersey Mike's has nearly 3,300 locations, making it the second-largest hoagie sandwich chain in the U.S. behind Subway.

item.title: The charts on this biotech stock look attractive, says Jay Woods
item.description: The chief market strategist at Freedom Capital Markets breaks down the technicals in this biotech name.

item.title: Levi's, The North Face and Columbia are turning to women to fuel their next phase of growth
item.description: Legacy apparel brands including VF Corp., Levi's, and Columbia are investing more heavily in women's products and marketing.

item.title: Married Americans tend to be wealthier and happier. Gen Z is forgoing the institution anyway
item.description: Gen Z defines the American Dream as having financial stability and being happy. Marriage could help them reach both of those goals, but many aren't sold on it.

item.title: GE Vernova's gas turbines aren't the only way it's winning from the AI boom
item.description: Electrification secured $2.4 billion in data center equipment orders during the first quarter of 2026, beating the segment's total for all of 2025.

item.title: Premier Lacrosse League plans to bring in team owners by 2028 'or soon thereafter,' co-founder says
item.description: Paul Rabil told CNBC he's banking on the 2028 Los Angeles Summer Games, where lacrosse will return as an Olympic sport, to shine a spotlight on the PLL.

item.title: Buying the American Dream: The best tools, strategies and hacks for first-time house hunters
item.description: Here's everything you need to know about buying your first home, including mortgage calculators, interest rate estimators and best mortgage lenders.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Rivian, Tesla, Sandisk, Blue Owl, AeroVironment & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Autonomous drone startup Quantum Systems raises $1.2 billion as investors pile into defense
item.description: Defense tech startups are raising record amounts on both sides of the Atlantic amid a flurry of investment in the sector.

item.title: House lawmakers approved a bipartisan bill to protect older adults from financial fraud. Here's what to know
item.description: The Financial Exploitation Prevention Act of 2025 is aimed at preventing adults age 65 or older or those with disabilities from losing their money to fraud.

item.title: Ford Q2 sales drop 10.3% due to F-Series supplier issue, falling EV demand
item.description: Ford said its EV sales fell by 40.7% during the quarter compared with a year earlier, while sales of its F-Series trucks, including the F-150, declined 11%.

item.title: Treasury says Trump Account investment options will include State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard ETFs
item.description: The Treasury Department said the investment lineup for Trump ‌Accounts includes ETFs from State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard.

item.title: U.S. closes 2022 probe into 695,000 Tesla vehicles over unexpected braking
item.description: The U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration closed its 2022 preliminary evaluation into 695,000 Tesla vehicles over unexpected deceleration.

item.title: Rivian raises 2026 delivery outlook while Lucid misses Wall Street expectations for second quarter
item.description: Rivian is increasing its delivery outlook to between 65,000 and 70,000 EVs, up from 62,000 to 67,000 units.

item.title: Meta’s push into cloud computing means Wall Street has to prepare for lower margins
item.description: Meta appears poised to enter the cloud computing market in an effort to monetize its massive AI infrastructure.
